items.summary: Modify the backend Motoko actor to add or update the graph data query so that it accepts the caller's principal (via the implicit `caller` context in a shared query) and returns only those nodes — Locations, LawTokens, InterpretationTokens, Curations, and Swarms — where the stored creator/owner field matches the caller's principal.

Update `getGraphData()` in both `frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx` and `frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx` to call the updated backend query that filters by caller/principal, replacing the previous unfiltered call. Ensure the React Query cache key reflects the authenticated principal so the data re-fetches correctly when the user logs in or out.
